title: Retain attributable plan history
description: Keep immutable plan content and sufficient lifecycle evidence to reconstruct owner intent.
target: 100% of draft creation, activation, and supersession events retain stable plan and revision references, actor context, reason, trusted timestamp, prior lifecycle state, resulting lifecycle state, and replacement reference where applicable; zero historical plan payloads are mutated in place.
load_condition: Repeated revision, activation, category rename, category archive, period closure, and history-read scenarios.
measurement: Lifecycle conformance tests compare event chains with revision payload hashes and expected actor, reason, timestamp, prior, resulting, and replacement fields.
rationale: Versioned plans have value only when changes remain explainable.
